display.name: Flexi, Stahlregen, Nitorami + Shifter - shader authoring motivation set
display.author: Flexi, Stahlregen, Nitorami + Shifter

annotation.technical_notes: Custom shape equations render overlapping, sharp-edged polygonal structures that fold and shear dynamically. The vertex positions are modulated by bass attenuated from the music, driving rapid, origami-like structural transformations. The absence of frame feedback through sampler_main preserves the clean, high-contrast vector aesthetic against a solid black background.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (24814 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
